summary: Tested Quick Sale Mode, Orders Manager Tab, Menu Items Support, and Referral System UI. All features working correctly. FIXED critical bug: Frontend was calling wrong API endpoint for order status update.

bug_fixed.issue: Frontend was calling /api/page-orders/{pageId}/{orderId}/status (404 Not Found) instead of /api/member-pages/orders/{orderId}/status

quick_sale_mode.barcode_search: POST /api/barcode/search - Returns product (name, price) for valid barcode
quick_sale_mode.ui_panel: Quick Sale Mode panel shows barcode input, item display, quantity selector (-/+), total, and Cash Payment button

orders_manager.get_transactions: GET /api/pos/{page_id}/transactions - Returns order list with summary ($124.97 total, 4 transactions)
orders_manager.ui_filters: All Orders | Pending | Confirmed | Preparing | Ready | Completed | Cancelled filters working
orders_manager.order_detail_modal: View button opens order detail with status update buttons

menu_items_support.get_menu: GET /api/page-menu/{page_id} - Returns menu items grouped by category
menu_items_support.create_menu_item: POST /api/page-menu/{page_id} - Creates menu item (requires restaurant page type)

referral_system.analytics_dashboard: Shows Referral Performance section with code (3C34827B), signups, link clicks, orders, revenue
referral_system.share_buttons: Twitter, Facebook, WhatsApp share buttons visible

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Quick Sale barcode lookup working via POST /api/barcode/search
✅ Quick Sale cash transaction creates order via POST /api/pos/transaction
✅ Orders Manager loads transactions via GET /api/pos/{page_id}/transactions
✅ Order status update working via PUT /api/member-pages/orders/{order_id}/status
✅ Referral System showing in Analytics Dashboard with code and share buttons
✅ All data-testid attributes present for Quick Sale components
seed_data_creation: Existing orders used: pos_d44f8a051568, pos_9642c82dab50, pos_e7282bbd548c, pos_a565b5637921
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quick Sale Mode fully functional: 1) Click 'Quick Sale Mode' button 2) Enter barcode 1234567890123 3) Product appears with price/qty 4) Click Cash Payment. Orders Manager: Shows order history with filters, clicking View opens detail modal with status update buttons. All APIs working. Frontend fix applied for order status endpoint.

.screenshots/barcode_search_result.png - Product found after barcode scan with Cash Payment button
